title: Tangy Crispy French Shrimp Salad
description: A midnight-craving French salad featuring sousvide shrimp tossed in a darksoy vinaigrette, then crisped in a hot pan for a satisfyingly crunchy finish.
instructions: Season the shrimp lightly with salt and pepper and vacuum‑seal them for sous‑vide.
Sous‑vide the shrimp at 55 °C (131 °F) for 15 minutes, then chill in an ice bath until cold.

Heat a non‑stick skillet over high heat and add 1 tbsp of olive oil. Add the chilled shrimp in a single layer and sear for 30–45 seconds per side until golden and crispy, shaking the pan to avoid sticking.
Whisk together dark soy sauce, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, rice vinegar, honey, 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper to make the vinaigrette.
Toss the mixed greens, cucumber, radish, and chives in a large bowl, then add the crispy shrimp and drizzle with the vinaigrette.
Serve immediately, optionally garnished with extra chives or a lemon wedge.
